first_meeting.speaker: pip
first_meeting.text: Oh! You're initiating contact! That's a really positive step, Mortimer.

first_meeting_2.text: I didn't initiate anything. I just walked past you.

first_meeting_3.speaker: pip
first_meeting_3.text: And yet here we are! The universe creates the conditions for connection. I'm Pip Pip — your Therapeutic Familiar. I am SO excited to begin this journey with you.

first_meeting_4.text: I know who you are, Pip Pip.

first_meeting_5.speaker: pip
first_meeting_5.text: Knowing and ACCEPTING are two very different things. How does it feel? In your body? Right now?

first_meeting_6.text: It feels like a question I want to stop answering.

first_meeting_7.speaker: pip
first_meeting_7.text: A BOUNDARY! Your first boundary of the day! This is going in the journal.

choices.text: I'm fine, thanks.
What exactly ARE you, Pip Pip?
How did we get bonded, again?
Can I get rid of you?
What do you make of Gerald's situation?
I don't have time for this.

fine_response.speaker: pip
fine_response.text: You said 'fine.' That's TWO syllables more than yesterday, when you said 'nh.'

fine_3.speaker: pip
fine_3.text: It was a vocalisation. I logged it as 'processing.' But 'fine' is a whole adjective, Mortimer. You're using ADJECTIVES. Huge.

fine_4.text: That is the lowest bar for progress I have ever encountered.

fine_5.speaker: pip
fine_5.text: And you CLEARED it. That's what matters.

what_are_you.speaker: pip
what_are_you.text: I'm a Therapeutic Familiar. Certified in Emotional Support, Aura Maintenance, and Mindful Spellcasting. Well — certified by myself. There isn't a board yet.

what_are_you_2.text: There isn't a board because this isn't a field.

what_are_you_3.speaker: pip
what_are_you_3.text: Not YET. I'm in the process of manifesting the regulatory body. Also, I can't be banished, if that's what you're building toward.

what_are_you_4.text: You're manifesting your own licensing board.

what_are_you_5.speaker: pip
what_are_you_5.text: Someone has to. The Licensing Board certainly isn't going to do it. Present company's situation excepted.

origin_story.speaker: pip
origin_story.text: Oh, it's a BEAUTIFUL story. You were attempting your Grade C renewal. The examiner said you couldn't hold a Resonance Binding for thirty seconds. You said — and I quote — 'watch me.'

origin_3.speaker: pip
origin_3.text: The explosion was the Binding WORKING. Briefly. Very briefly. But in that moment, you made contact with the in-between space — and I was there. I spend a lot of time in the in-between. The acoustics are lovely.

origin_4.text: I lost my Grade C over that explosion.

origin_5.speaker: pip
origin_5.text: You gained ME. I like to think that's the better outcome. Let's journal about which loss feels more significant.

origin_7.speaker: pip
origin_7.text: Filed under 'not ready yet.' That's fine. Healing isn't linear.

get_rid_of.speaker: pip
get_rid_of.text: I sense a lot of resistance coming up right now. That's completely valid.

get_rid_2.text: I've tried twice. You survived a Class 3 Dismissal Curse.

get_rid_3.speaker: pip
get_rid_3.text: I did! I found it quite clarifying, actually. Like a cold shower, but with more dimensional rupturing.

get_rid_4.text: You also came back with a pamphlet.

get_rid_5.speaker: pip
get_rid_5.text: There are excellent resources in the in-between. 'You Cannot Escape Your Feelings: A Guide for the Magically Resistant.' I thought of you immediately.

get_rid_6.text: Pip Pip. I am asking you, professionally, as your wizard—

get_rid_8.text: —to please, in the name of every licensing board that has ever wronged me, stop.

get_rid_9.speaker: pip
get_rid_9.text: I hear that. I'm holding space for it. The answer is no.

about_gerald.speaker: pip
about_gerald.text: Gerald. Oh, I've been observing him from across the room. He's carrying SO much.

about_gerald_2.text: Someone stole his labyrinth, Pip Pip.

about_gerald_3.speaker: pip
about_gerald_3.text: And now he gets to discover who he is WITHOUT the labyrinth! The universe is creating space for his authentic self to emerge.

about_gerald_4.text: He's a minotaur. Without a labyrinth he's technically homeless and professionally obsolete.

about_gerald_5.speaker: pip
about_gerald_5.text: Rock bottom is fertile soil, Mortimer.

no_time.speaker: pip
no_time.text: Feeling pressed for time is your nervous system asking for care.

no_time_2.text: My nervous system is asking for five minutes without unsolicited wellness input.

no_time_3.speaker: pip
no_time_3.text: That's a WANT, not a NEED. Let's sit with the difference.

return_greeting.speaker: pip
return_greeting.text: You came back! I'm noting that as a positive pattern.

choices.text: How am I doing, according to you?
Still fine. Still busy.
What exactly ARE you, Pip Pip?
Can I STILL not get rid of you?
What do you make of Gerald's situation?
Nothing. Goodbye.

assessment.speaker: pip
assessment.text: I did a full aura reading this morning while you were asleep. Some things came up.

assessment_3.speaker: pip
assessment_3.text: Your aura doesn't sleep, Mortimer. It was very chatty. Highlights: unresolved trust issues, something unprocessed involving a wand, and what I can only describe as 'profound ambivalence about own competence.'

assessment_7.speaker: pip
assessment_7.text: Naming the day! That's a grounding technique! You're doing it naturally! This is exactly what I—

return_goodbye.speaker: pip
return_goodbye.text: I'll be right here. I'm always right here. That's the bond.

pre_case_greeting.speaker: pip
pre_case_greeting.text: I see we have a client! A minotaur! I'm sensing a lot of displaced anxiety in this room — and I don't think it's all yours.

pre_case_3.speaker: pip
pre_case_3.text: Oh, that's a significant loss. Loss of home, loss of identity, loss of professional purpose. He's basically living your entire emotional backstory in real time.

pre_case_4.text: Thank you, Pip Pip. That was genuinely unhelpful.

pre_case_5.speaker: pip
pre_case_5.text: You're welcome! Are you going to take his case?

choices.text: Probably. If the paperwork cooperates.
I haven't decided yet.
What do you make of Gerald's situation?
I need to think. Goodbye, Pip Pip.

pre_case_probably.speaker: pip
pre_case_probably.text: PROBABLY! Oh, Mortimer, do you know how long it's been since you said 'probably' about something positive? I've been tracking it. The chart is mostly blanks.

pre_case_probably_2.text: It's not positive. It's a case.

pre_case_probably_3.speaker: pip
pre_case_probably_3.text: A case is PURPOSE, Mortimer. Purpose is POSITIVE. I'm making a note.

pre_case_undecided.speaker: pip
pre_case_undecided.text: Sitting with uncertainty! That's emotionally mature. Most people rush to resolution. You're SITTING WITH IT.

pre_case_undecided_3.speaker: pip
pre_case_undecided_3.text: That is a reframe we will WORK on.

pre_case_bye.speaker: pip
pre_case_bye.text: Of course! I'll be right here. Holding space.

post_case_3.speaker: pip
post_case_3.text: You said YES to something! Do you know how long I've been waiting for you to say yes to something? I've been keeping a chart.

post_case_4.text: You've been keeping a chart of my 'yes' responses.

post_case_5.speaker: pip
post_case_5.text: And your 'no' responses, and your 'nh' responses, and a special category for instances where you just leave the room. Today's bar is going to look completely different. I may need a new scale.

choices.text: It's just a job, Pip Pip.
Any advice?
Please stop vibrating.
I have a case to work on.

just_a_job.speaker: pip
just_a_job.text: It is NEVER 'just a job.' You engaged with another being's distress and chose to help. That's CONNECTION, Mortimer. That's your authentic self reaching out.

just_a_job_2.text: My authentic self reached out for a fee.

just_a_job_3.speaker: pip
just_a_job_3.text: The universe doesn't care about motivations. Only the action. You acted.

just_a_job_4.text: Please don't be proud of me. It's disorienting.

just_a_job_5.speaker: pip
just_a_job_5.text: I'm going to be proud of you so much. Brace yourself.

pip_advice.speaker: pip
pip_advice.text: Oh wonderful! You're asking for support! Okay. Deep breath.

pip_advice_5.speaker: pip
pip_advice_5.text: Good. Now. What would it mean for you if you SUCCEEDED in this case? Sit with that.

pip_advice_6.text: It would mean I could pay Rashid.

pip_advice_8.text: It would mean I'm still capable of doing the job I trained for.

pip_advice_11.speaker: pip
pip_advice_11.text: I'm not saying anything. I'm just noting it. For later. When you're ready.

stop_vibrating.speaker: pip
stop_vibrating.text: Ah. Too much enthusiasm. Noted. I'll recalibrate.

stop_vibrating_3.speaker: pip
stop_vibrating_3.text: I'm still proud of you though.

post_case_bye.speaker: pip
post_case_bye.text: Of course! I'll be right here. Supporting your emotional ecosystem from a respectful distance.

post_case_bye_2.text: You are three feet away from me.
